calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-26-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Maureen McFadden for Mary Ellen McCarthy (Petitioner).

Ms. McFadden stated that she believed that a separate estate checking account was set up, stated that her Client kept everything on a spread sheet, that her Client did not list two rent checks and addressed the issue regarding the late creditor's claim. In addition, Ms. McFadden addressed the issue regarding the 1/7 distribution and repayment to the Administrator. The Court directed Ms. McFadden to submit a signed creditor's claim. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy K. Sandberg.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-29-2009 Continued To Aug-05-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
